scripts.dev: node -e "const path=require('path'); const rawRoot=process.env.npm_config_local_prefix || process.env.INIT_CWD || path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json || path.join(process.cwd(),'package.json')); let root=rawRoot; if (root.startsWith('\\\\?\\')) root=root.slice(4); const script=path.join(root,'scripts','run-next.cjs'); process.argv=['node',script,'dev','-p','3005']; require(script);"
scripts.build: node -e "const path=require('path'); const rawRoot=process.env.npm_config_local_prefix || process.env.INIT_CWD || path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json || path.join(process.cwd(),'package.json')); let root=rawRoot; if (root.startsWith('\\\\?\\')) root=root.slice(4); const script=path.join(root,'scripts','run-next.cjs'); process.argv=['node',script,'build']; require(script);"
scripts.start: node -e "const path=require('path'); const rawRoot=process.env.npm_config_local_prefix || process.env.INIT_CWD || path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json || path.join(process.cwd(),'package.json')); let root=rawRoot; if (root.startsWith('\\\\?\\')) root=root.slice(4); const script=path.join(root,'scripts','run-next.cjs'); process.argv=['node',script,'start']; require(script);"
